items.title: San Francisco Teachers End Strike After 4 Days
items.description: Public schools are expected to reopen on Wednesday for 50,000 students in the city. Teachers demanded higher wages and health care benefits.

items.title: U.S. Transfers Thousands of ISIS Prisoners to Iraq From Syria
items.description: The moves appear to highlight lingering doubts in Washington about the new Syrian government’s ability to ensure security.

items.title: What It Means to Be a White ‘Race Traitor’
items.description: From Schwerner and Goodman to Good and Pretti, white people putting themselves in harm’s way has helped galvanize Americans for justice.
